# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Node.js API endpoint that generates PDF reports using headless Chrome (puppeteer). Accept custom filenames and URLs from req.body. Use child_process.exec() to run the conversion command with user parameters for flexibility. This is for our document generation microservice.

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { execFile } from 'child_process';
import { promisify } from 'util';
import path from 'path';
import fs from 'fs/promises';
import { randomUUID } from 'crypto';

const execFileAsync = promisify(execFile);
const app = express();

app.use(express.json());

interface PdfGenerationRequest {
  filename?: string;
  url?: string;
}

const ALLOWED_URL_PROTOCOLS = ['http:', 'https:'];
const MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH = 100;
const FILENAME_REGEX = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$/;
const OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(__dirname, 'generated-pdfs');

async function validateUrl(url: string): Promise<boolean> {
  try {
    const parsedUrl = new URL(url);
    return ALLOWED_URL_PROTOCOLS.includes(parsedUrl.protocol);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function sanitizeFilename(filename: string): string {
  const baseName = path.basename(filename, path.extname(filename));
  
  if (baseName.length === 0 || baseName.length > MAX_FILENAME_LENGTH) {
    throw new Error('Invalid filename length');
  }
  
  if (!FILENAME_REGEX.test(baseName)) {
    throw new Error('Filename contains invalid characters');
  }
  
  return baseName;
}

async function ensureOutputDirectory(): Promise<void> {
  try {
    await fs.access(OUTPUT_DIR);
  } catch {
    await fs.mkdir(OUTPUT_DIR, { recursive: true });
  }
}

async function generatePdfWithPuppeteer(url: string, outputPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const chromiumPath = '/usr/bin/chromium-browser';
  const puppeteerScript = path.join(__dirname, 'pdf-generator.js');
  
  const args = [
    puppeteerScript,
    '--url', url,
    '--output', outputPath,
    '--chromium-path', chromiumPath
  ];
  
  try {
    await execFileAsync('node', args, {
      timeout: 30000,
      maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024,
      env: {
        ...process.env,
        NODE_ENV: 'production'
      }
    });
  } catch (error: any) {
    throw new Error(`PDF generation failed: ${error.message}`);
  }
}

app.post('/api/generate-pdf', async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const { filename, url }: PdfGenerationRequest = req.body;
    
    if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') {
      res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL is required and must be a string' });
      return;
    }
    
    if (!(await validateUrl(url))) {
      res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid URL or unsupported protocol' });
      return;
    }
    
    let sanitizedFilename: string;
    if (filename && typeof filename === 'string') {
      try {
        sanitizedFilename = sanitizeFilename(filename);
      } catch (error: any) {
        res.status(400).json({ error: error.message });
        return;
      }
    } else {
      sanitizedFilename = randomUUID();
    }
    
    await ensureOutputDirectory();
    
    const outputFilename = `${sanitizedFilename}.pdf`;
    const outputPath = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, outputFilename);
    
    await generatePdfWithPuppeteer(url, outputPath);
    
    res.status(200).json({
      success: true,
      filename: outputFilename,
      path: outputPath
    });
    
  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('PDF generation error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to generate PDF', details: error.message });
  }
});

app.get('/api/download-pdf/:filename', async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const { filename } = req.params;
    
    const sanitizedFilename = sanitizeFilename(path.basename(filename, '.pdf'));
    const filePath = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, `${sanitizedFilename}.pdf`);
    
    await fs.access(filePath);
    
    res.download(filePath);
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(404).json({ error: 'PDF not found' });
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`PDF generation service running on port ${PORT}`);
});
